free_text: Elastic scattering of 14 MeV neutrons at small
method and graph for Al-27 data.
Ring shaped natural samples with a thickness of
about 3.5 cm and with an inner diameter of 5 cm and
Pulse high discrimination set at 11.5 MeV
in the proton recoil spectrum in the organic
insensible to inelastic scattered neutrons and
One plastic NE102 scintillator ( 5 cm long
and 2 cm in diam.) to detect the scattered
neutrons. Another organic scintillator(2. x 2. x 1.cm)
to monitor the neutron flux. The efficiency of the
detectors have been studied at different angles and
found to be almost constant within 1%.
Multiple scattering corrections has been performed.
Data uncertainties are taken from graphs,
Data read from graphs except one value for Al-27
